content: 2021 is hosting most major events that were originally scheduled for 2020, including the Eurovision Song Contest, the 26th United Nations Climate Change Conference, and Expo 2020, along with many sporting events, including the UEFA Euro 2020, 2020 Summer Olympics, and the 2021 Copa América; events that were postponed or cancelled due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The United Nations declared 2021 as the International Year of Peace and Trust, the International Year of Creative Economy for Sustainable Development, the International Year of Fruit s and Vegetable s, and the International Year for the Elimination of Child Labour. The Catholic Church has proclaimed 2021 as the Year of Saint Joseph.
